title: Language Generation Path
description: Build fluency in Language Generation inside Reinforcement Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: SWE-bench
steps.summary: SWE-bench belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Language Generation. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Language Generation. Compare it with Set Theory and Interactive Storytelling. It opens into Multi-Agent SWE-Bench and SWE-bench+ (code agent eval).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: plan generate and evaluate

steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
